name: Fire-safety acceptance of a zone
description: Before a zone can be occupied, a fire-safety officer accepts that detection, egress and suppression are in place. The acceptance is anchored to the same building zone as the construction work — different domain, same place.

evidence.description: Signed fire-safety inspection report for the zone.

checks.description: A fire-safety inspection report must be attached.
The zone must be a valid building zone id (e.g. A1-F03).

reviewer.description: The officer who accepts fire-safety responsibility for the zone.

consequences.description: Fire-safety acceptance unlocks occupancy of the zone.
The officer carries fire-safety liability for the zone.
